rationale: The cited paper appears as a single background citation in the introduction, used to support the general claim that understanding why consumers defer purchase is managerially important. The citing article does not engage this specific paper's response-mode mechanism in its hypotheses, empirical design, or interpretation of results. Core theorizing and tests in the citing paper are instead built around serotonin depletion, cognitive resource limits, and compromise-effect/deferral literatures more broadly.
